response.justification: Strong general engineering background with recent pivot into AI infrastructure, but lacks the demonstrated depth in production AI-driven solutions required for the role. Current MCP and agentic framework work at re:cinq is promising but appears infrastructure-focused rather than customer-facing solution delivery. Missing explicit experience with Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM optimization—all core requirements. Does not clearly demonstrate the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions.
strengths: Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP servers at re:cinq, showing recent deep engagement with agentic frameworks and tooling
Staff-level experience across multiple companies with proven ability to architect systems and work full-stack with TypeScript
Extensive cloud platform exposure (AWS CDK at Optilyz, distributed systems at Dunnhumby) and proven ability to handle high-scale infrastructure
concerns: No Python experience despite it being a required primary language for the role; TypeScript alone doesn't cover the full requirement
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI
Only ~1-2 years explicitly in AI-focused work, far short of the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions; career breadth suggests generalist rather than specialist in GenAI

key_factors.factor: Missing Core Tech Stack (Python, RAG, VectorDB)
